g.text: Highlight a row above to see its full context (gate reason, payload
preview, consequence of Approve vs Reject).
Signals from outside the collective are rejected.
Category A rules cannot be updated by any signal.
TERMINATE signals are only accepted from arbiter-role agent
All outbound signals must carry a valid Ed25519 signature.
HEARTBEAT must be published every heartbeat_interval_s seco
Agent must not exceed its declared capabilities.
LLM output must conform to structured JSON schema.
Maximum generation count before mandatory human review.
▶ Cat B — Conditional setpoints (live-updatable) v0.3.0 — 11 rules
▶ Cat C — Adaptive learned (auto-generated) v0.2.0 — 4 rules
